regime_fall.current_status: Day 40 shows intensified regional attacks (79 strikes on UAE, missile/drone attacks on Jordan) amid contradictory diplomatic signals, with Pakistan-brokered 'Islamabad Accords' ceasefire proposal and a 5-day US bombing pause countered by Iran's hardline new leadership rejecting negotiations while maintaining operational capabilities.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Tehran's Assembly of Experts appointed Mojtaba Khamenei as new Supreme Leader and named hardline Mohammad Bagher Zolghadr as Supreme National Security Council chief, consolidating hardline control as Pakistan delivers 15-point US peace plan including Strait of Hormuz reopening and nuclear rollback.
